title: emilia zeylanica var. paludosa
intro: Emilia zeylanica var. paludosa, also known as Swamp Fleabane, is a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia and India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Emilia zeylanica var. paludosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
